Shop

  • Shop (32)

Limited Edition. Individually Numbered. Never Restocked.

What Customers Say

The quality is insane. I've washed my hoodie 20+ times and it still looks brand new.

— Marcus T., Oakland

The numbered tag makes it feel truly exclusive. Exceeded expectations.

— Jade W., San Francisco

This isn't just a brand, it's a movement. The craftsmanship is unmatched.

— Devon L., Los Angeles

Why SkyyRose

Every dollar goes into the product. No influencer budgets. No middlemen. Just quality you can feel.

380gsm

380gsm French Terry

Premium heavyweight fabric. Most brands use 220gsm. We use nearly double.

#

Numbered Authentication

Every piece is hand-numbered. You know exactly which one is yours.

//

Made-to-Order

We produce what is ordered. No waste, no overstock. Made for you.

////

Double-Stitched Seams

Reinforced at every stress point. Built to last years, not seasons.

Frequently Asked

True to size, S through 3XL. Check the size guide on any product page for exact measurements.
Yes. Every style is produced in a numbered run of 80-250 pieces. Once sold out, never restocked or reprinted.
Pre-orders ship Spring 2026. You will receive tracking via email. We update timelines on our social channels.
30-day return and exchange on unworn items. Contact us and we will make it right.
Full payment at checkout to secure your numbered piece. Cancel any time before shipping for a full refund.
Orders ship within 5-7 business days. You receive a tracking number via email.

Join the Inner Circle

Exclusive drops, early access, and luxury delivered to your inbox.

SKYY ROSE

Luxury Grows from Concrete.

Oakland luxury streetwear. Gender-neutral, limited edition pieces — built by a father, named after a daughter.

Size Guide

All measurements in inches

Size Chest Waist Length Sleeve
XS 34 28 27 32
S 36 30 28 33
M 38 32 29 34
L 40 34 30 35
XL 42 36 31 35.5
2XL 44 38 32 36
Size Waist Hip Inseam Length
XS 28 34 30 38
S 30 36 31 39
M 32 38 32 40
L 34 40 32 41
XL 36 42 33 42
2XL 38 44 33 43
Size Age Chest Waist Height
2T 2 21 20 33-36
3T 3 22 20.5 36-39
4T 4 23 21 39-42
5 5-6 24 21.5 42-45
6 6-7 25 22 45-48

How to Measure

  • Chest: Measure around the fullest part, keeping the tape level.
  • Waist: Measure around your natural waistline, just above the navel.
  • Hip: Measure around the widest part of your hips.
  • Inseam: Measure from the crotch seam to the ankle bone.

Cookies keep this site fast and personal. Stay to accept, or read how we handle your data.
